title: melicope evansensis
intro: Melicope evansensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the yellow peony or yellow hawthorn, native to Hawaii. The plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Melicope evansensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as acne and wounds. Herbal preparations of Melicope evansensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
